scripts.setup: npm --prefix map3d-react install && npm --prefix map3d-demo install
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix map3d-react run typecheck && npm --prefix map3d-demo run typecheck
scripts.build: npm --prefix map3d-react run build && npm --prefix map3d-demo run build
scripts.demo: npm --prefix map3d-react run build && npm --prefix map3d-demo run dev
scripts.demo:build: npm --prefix map3d-react run build && npm --prefix map3d-demo run build
